landing.faq.license.question: Can I use the generated videos commercially?
landing.faq.license.answer: Yes. Videos you generate with kimik3 are yours to use commercially — you own the output, with no watermark on paid plans. Just make sure the source design is yours to use. That's what makes the kimik3 motion tool practical for client work, ads, and launches.

landing.meta.home_title: kimik3: AI Motion Tool for Designers (KimiK3 Alternative)
landing.meta.home_description: kimik3 is the AI motion tool for designers. Upload a design and get a motion video in 30 seconds — faster and cheaper than official KimiK3.
landing.about.title: A motion tool built for designers
landing.about.intro_1: kimik3 is an AI motion tool that turns static designs into short motion videos. Upload a frame from Figma, Photoshop, Sketch, or a screenshot, and kimik3 returns a polished, share-ready motion clip in about 30 seconds — no video editing, no After Effects timeline, and no motion-design background required. Whether you're animating a product hero, a logo sting, or an onboarding screen, kimik3 handles the camera moves, transitions, and pacing so you can ship motion the same day you design it.
landing.about.intro_2: kimik3 exists because the official KimiK3 isn't built for this. Designers don't need another chatbot — they need their work to move. Where official KimiK3 answers text, the kimik3 motion tool answers a design: it focuses on one job, design-to-motion, and does it faster and cheaper than waiting on official motion features. That single-minded focus is why designers reach for kimik3 when a launch deck, an ad, or a product page needs motion by tomorrow instead of next week.
landing.about.intro_3: Designers reach for kimik3 when motion is the bottleneck. Instead of booking a video editor or learning a timeline, you drop in a frame and the kimik3 motion tool handles the rest — picking a focal point, smoothing the transitions, and keeping every clip on-brand. Because kimik3 is built around design-to-motion rather than general chat, the output feels intentional: motion that serves the product, not motion for its own sake. The result is a kimik3 motion video ready for decks, ads, social, and product pages in the time it takes to write the brief.
landing.about.items: Upload to animate|||Drop in a design and kimik3 returns a motion video in about 30 seconds — no editing required.##Auto motion & transitions|||kimik3 finds the focal point and adds camera moves, transitions, and rhythm for you.##Broad format support|||Upload PNG and JPG exports from Figma, Photoshop, or Sketch; kimik3 outputs your motion as MP4 or GIF.##Style you control|||Pick a pace and mood — restrained, lively, or cinematic — and kimik3 keeps every motion clip consistent and reusable.##Faster & cheaper than official|||No waiting on official KimiK3 motion features. With kimik3 you pay per clip or by plan, and costs stay predictable.##Commercial-ready|||Videos you generate with kimik3 are yours to use commercially — you own the output.

landing.compare.title: KimiK3 vs Claude vs GPT
landing.compare.description: Side-by-side API pricing, context window, and open-weight availability for the leading frontier models.
landing.compare.takeaway: Kimi K3 ($3 / $15 per MTok) undercuts the flagship Claude Opus 4.8 and GPT-5.5 — and it's the only one of the three shipping open weights.
landing.compare.sonnet_note: Claude Sonnet 5 is on introductory pricing through Aug 31, 2026; standard pricing of $3 / $15 per MTok applies from Sep 1, 2026.
landing.compare.disclaimer: Prices in USD per million tokens, as of July 2026. Not affiliated with Moonshot AI, Anthropic, or OpenAI. Prices change — always verify on the official pricing pages.

landing.builtfor.title: Built for people who ship visuals
landing.builtfor.description: From solo designers to in-house brand teams — kimik3 turns static frames into motion your stakeholders actually say yes to.
landing.builtfor.cards: Product & UI designers|||Turn Figma frames into motion mocks and prototype videos without opening After Effects.##Motion designers|||Skip the manual keyframing for rough cuts — generate a first pass in seconds, then refine.##Brand & creative teams|||Ship consistent motion across launches, ads, and social without a video specialist.##Agencies & freelancers|||Deliver polished motion to clients at a fraction of the usual time and cost.
landing.builtfor.quote: We turned our last six product reveals into motion videos in an afternoon. What used to take our video team a week now takes a designer a coffee.
landing.builtfor.quote_author: Dana R. — Senior Product Designer, Northwind Labs

landing.vfeatures.items: Workspaces that match how you think|||Organize chats, projects, and prompts into shared workspaces with the right context for every team.##Build a whole project from one prompt|||Turn a single message into a full draft, outline, or plan — then refine it conversation by conversation.##Memory & knowledge that follow you|||Upload files and let kimik3 search them by meaning, not keywords — your library becomes an instant answer engine.##Built for teams to think together|||Comments, roles, and shared spaces keep everyone aligned, from first idea to final review.

landing.faq.vs_kimik3.question: How is this different from KimiK3?
landing.faq.vs_kimik3.answer: KimiK3 is a general-purpose AI chatbot built for text. kimik3 is a focused motion tool: it does one thing — turn a design into a motion video — and does it better, faster, and cheaper than waiting for official KimiK3 to add motion features. The kimik3 motion tool skips prompts and chat entirely. You upload a frame, pick a pace, and ship. If you've been waiting on KimiK3 for design-to-motion, kimik3 is the shortcut.
landing.faq.how.question: How does it work?
landing.faq.how.answer: Upload a design image (PNG or JPG from Figma, Photoshop, or Sketch), pick a pace and mood, and the kimik3 motion tool generates a short motion video — adding camera moves, transitions, and rhythm automatically. The whole thing takes about 30 seconds, then you export your motion as MP4 or GIF.
landing.faq.time_cost.question: How long does a video take, and what does it cost?
landing.faq.time_cost.answer: About 30 seconds per video. With kimik3 you can pay per clip or subscribe for a monthly allowance — see the pricing section for plans. Free credits are included to start, so you can generate your first kimik3 motion video before paying anything.
landing.faq.formats.question: What formats and design tools are supported?
landing.faq.formats.answer: kimik3 accepts PNG and JPG uploads from Figma, Photoshop, Sketch, or anywhere else. Output is MP4 and GIF, ready to drop into decks, social, ads, or product pages. The kimik3 motion tool sizes each export for the destination you pick.
